mapper.insert: INSERT INTO items (name, sales_unit, batch_size, standard_cost, sales_price, is_active) VALUES (#{name}, #{salesUnit}, #{batchSize}, #{standardCost}, #{salesPrice}, #{isActive})
mapper.update: UPDATE items SET name = #{name}, sales_unit = #{salesUnit}, batch_size = #{batchSize}, standard_cost = #{standardCost}, sales_price = #{salesPrice}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE items SET is_active = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE items SET is_active = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
